title: 2026 Grammys Awards Predictions in Every Category
text: Variety's Grammy predictions favor Kendrick Lamar's GNX to capture the Best Rap Album award. The nominees include Clipse (Let God Sort Em Out), GloRilla (Glorious), JID (God Does Like Ugly), Kendrick Lamar (GNX), and Tyler, the Creator (Chromakopia). Variety's predictions favor Kendrick Lamar's latest project to capture this category, with Clipse's collaborative effort as the primary alternative possibility. The prediction underscores Kendrick's dominance in hip-hop following his significant cultural moment earlier in the year.
